_comment: GIDs chosen by actual usage frequency: scan of the 36 levels shipped in the game's assets/tiledmaps/level_*.tmx (map/props layers decompressed, tallied per tileset + local id). We keep the tiles the game's level designers use most, filtered to exclude directional/junction variants (only suitable for 4/3/2/1/0-way automapping). 'ground' (default fill for every unclassified cell) uses the same GIDs as 'grass': the whole map background is grassy. No 'water' or 'rail' tile exists in t_alltiles (no shipped level has any): water falls back to the closest ground tone. Roads: only flat asphalt tiles without directional markings for the interior; edges/corners are handled by the road_edge_*/road_corner_* system (assignments derived from each tile's dominant neighbor pattern across the shipped levels).

props._comment: Coherent countryside theme (the game's 'suburbs' family + official modkit prefabs). tree = farmstead vegetation (ids 48-63, firstgid 3009) + real forest.tsx trees (firstgid 3081, ids 0-7). decor = farm equipment + barns/farmhouses/silo from farmstead (fields only). wall = automapper markers (firstgid 4247) expanded by the modkit's automapping: 0024-farmfence (4275), 0019-subwallbrick_bottom (4268), 0020-subwallbrickline (4270), 0018-subwallshrub (4267) - the script picks ONE style per connected run to avoid patchwork along a single fence. car = cars.tsx (firstgid 2340, 28 models), scattered on roads via car_density_on_road. buildings = complete house prefabs (see building_catalog).
props._comment_zones: Zone pools (selected by OSM landuse/leisure/amenity polygons). decor_park = subdeck.tsx (firstgid 2903, park decks/furniture). decor_cemetery = graves.tsx (firstgid 3313, most-used gravestones). decor_industrial = indmini clutter from mini.tsx (firstgid 3465) + mini_big.tsx (firstgid 3820: pipes, tanks, poles). Generic decor gains citymini urban clutter from mini.tsx (one _0000 variant per design). building_catalog_industrial = modware.tsx modular warehouse pieces (firstgid 2595) + freeb.tsx industrial buildings (2625) + subsechut.tsx sheds (2927), all 1x1 sprites designed to tile adjacently. building_catalog_cemetery = crypts.tsx bigcrypt mausoleums (firstgid 3285).

building_catalog._comment: automapper_prefabs markers (firstgid 4278): COMPLETE pre-assembled houses from the modkit, not subhouse corner parts. house1-1..4 (ids 0-3, 4 orientations, ~3x3 footprint) and house-2x2 (id 10, exact 2x2 footprint). WARNING: these are editor MARKERS (no JSON in assets/data/props) - they must be expanded by the modkit Tiled's automapping (suburbs_house*.tmx rules in rules.txt), which replaces them with the correct subhouse assembly + yard; without that pass the level will not load in game.

markers._comment: auto: the tool places the three markers on the road network at any output size and paints these GIDs on the 'objectives' layer: objective = gid 144 (OBJECTIVE tile from t_alltiles), spawn = gid 154 (Faction Spawners id 9, ai_state=PLAYER), exit = gid 2205 (exits.tsx id 0, exitgate). Alternative: 'preserve-template' keeps the template's own objectives layer untouched (only meaningful when the output size equals the template's 120x120; otherwise the tool falls back to auto with a warning).

road_widths_m._comment: Overridden for readable tile widths at 6-12 m/tile (otherwise every road, from farm track to motorway, rounds down to the 1-tile minimum and becomes indistinguishable). Values chosen to give ~1-2 tiles to small roads and 2-4 tiles to major axes.
